Café Amazon

commercial blend arabica robusta widely-available

Café Amazon

คาเฟ่ อเมซอน

3.9
★ ★ ★ ★ ☆
2100 reviews
Origin Multiple Thai Regions
Roast Levels medium dark
Price Range ฿85–130 / 200g
Founded 2002
Formats ground, drip bag, capsule

PTT's wildly successful café chain with over 4,000 outlets across Thailand. Café Amazon's retail ground coffee brings the familiar chain taste home, blending robusta and arabica for broad appeal.

Official Website ↗

Flavor Profile

Approachable and consistent. Medium-bodied blend of Thai arabica and robusta. Caramel sweetness upfront, mild cocoa notes, smooth aftertaste designed for mass appeal.

Tasting Notes

caramel milk chocolate mild nuts smooth finish

Flavor Breakdown

Body
3/5
Acidity
2/5
Sweetness
3/5
Bitterness
3/5
Aroma
3/5
